testcase.classname: invalidExerciseEditMessage returns null for a valid strength exercise edit payload
testcase.name: invalidExerciseEditMessage returns null for a valid strength exercise edit payload

testcase.classname: invalidExerciseEditMessage returns null for a valid strength exercise with comma-separated weights
testcase.name: invalidExerciseEditMessage returns null for a valid strength exercise with comma-separated weights

testcase.classname: invalidExerciseEditMessage returns null for a valid cardio exercise without weight validation
testcase.name: invalidExerciseEditMessage returns null for a valid cardio exercise without weight validation

testcase.classname: invalidExerciseEditMessage returns an error when the description is too short
testcase.name: invalidExerciseEditMessage returns an error when the description is too short

testcase.classname: invalidExerciseEditMessage returns an error when the weight description uses an unsupported unit for strength
testcase.name: invalidExerciseEditMessage returns an error when the weight description uses an unsupported unit for strength

testcase.classname: invalidExerciseEditMessage returns null for bodyweight exercises
testcase.name: invalidExerciseEditMessage returns null for bodyweight exercises

testcase.classname: listExercises returns numeric exercise fields as numbers when the driver yields strings
testcase.name: listExercises returns numeric exercise fields as numbers when the driver yields strings

testcase.classname: createWorkoutsHandler returns 401 when session user is not present
testcase.name: createWorkoutsHandler returns 401 when session user is not present

testcase.classname: createWorkoutsHandler returns 401 when user is not found in the database
testcase.name: createWorkoutsHandler returns 401 when user is not found in the database

testcase.classname: createWorkoutsHandler returns 400 for non-numeric page query parameter
testcase.name: createWorkoutsHandler returns 400 for non-numeric page query parameter

testcase.classname: createWorkoutsHandler returns paginated workout list for GET requests
testcase.name: createWorkoutsHandler returns paginated workout list for GET requests

testcase.classname: createWorkoutsHandler returns 422 when workout validation fails
testcase.name: createWorkoutsHandler returns 422 when workout validation fails

testcase.classname: createWorkoutsHandler returns 401 when user id cannot be resolved after validation
testcase.name: createWorkoutsHandler returns 401 when user id cannot be resolved after validation

testcase.classname: createWorkoutsHandler returns 201 with the new workout id for valid POST
testcase.name: createWorkoutsHandler returns 201 with the new workout id for valid POST

testcase.classname: createWorkoutWithExerciseHandler returns 401 when user is not authenticated
testcase.name: createWorkoutWithExerciseHandler returns 401 when user is not authenticated

testcase.classname: createWorkoutWithExerciseHandler returns 401 when user is not found in the database
testcase.name: createWorkoutWithExerciseHandler returns 401 when user is not found in the database

testcase.classname: createWorkoutWithExerciseHandler returns 422 when workout validation fails
testcase.name: createWorkoutWithExerciseHandler returns 422 when workout validation fails

testcase.classname: createWorkoutWithExerciseHandler returns 422 when exercise validation fails
testcase.name: createWorkoutWithExerciseHandler returns 422 when exercise validation fails

testcase.classname: createWorkoutWithExerciseHandler returns 201 with full workout details on success
testcase.name: createWorkoutWithExerciseHandler returns 201 with full workout details on success

testcase.classname: createWorkoutWithExerciseHandler returns 500 when workout cannot be fetched after creation
testcase.name: createWorkoutWithExerciseHandler returns 500 when workout cannot be fetched after creation

testcase.classname: createWorkoutWithExerciseHandler returns 401 when user id cannot be resolved after validation
testcase.name: createWorkoutWithExerciseHandler returns 401 when user id cannot be resolved after validation

testcase.classname: createLoginHandler returns 422 for invalid credentials
testcase.name: createLoginHandler returns 422 for invalid credentials

testcase.classname: createLoginHandler returns a session cookie for valid credentials
testcase.name: createLoginHandler returns a session cookie for valid credentials

testcase.classname: createAccountHandler returns current user for GET requests
testcase.name: createAccountHandler returns current user for GET requests

testcase.classname: createAccountHandler clears the cookie after account deletion
testcase.name: createAccountHandler clears the cookie after account deletion

testcase.classname: createAccountHandler returns 401 when user is not authenticated
testcase.name: createAccountHandler returns 401 when user is not authenticated
